item.title: OC comic repost- help me save my dog
item.description: I have been a long time imgurian comic artist who shares her stories. I posted yesterday about my dog needing help and so many of you rallied around us and generated funds and upvotes for exposure. Atreyu is still in the animal hospital and his bills have gone up to $8,500 and it’s growing each day Atreyu needs to be hospitalized. Thanks to Imgur, my family and friends we have reached $5,000 so far. We are terrified the vet bills might go over $8,500 so any extra funds will be saved for any complications (Edit/update- the costs went up again he has an infection and they think he needs another surgery to scope for necrosis- new bill is around 10,000) We are desperate to save him. If you have ever laughed, smiled or enjoyed my comics I beg of you to help upvote this for the fund awareness. I don’t want to lose my best friend. Please and thank you from the bottom of my heart. —————- Original post details: We need help. On May 11th, at 11:30 pm, our beloved German Shepherd, Atreyu, had his stomach flip; Gastric Dilatation Volvulus (GDV). This is an emergency and life-threatening situation in which a dog with this condition has on average two hours to live. That night, while feeding my foster kitten, I checked on Atreyu, who had seemed slightly off the hour before. His abdomen had swelled up to three or four times the size it should be. I knew instantly his stomach had flipped and he was nearing death. Freddie was able to speed to the Veterinary ER Hospital and get there in just enough time for them to perform the life-saving surgery. Atreyu isn’t out of the woods yet, he will be hospitalized for a few more days. His organs had a lot of pressure put on them: especially his liver and spleen, so he is in a critical wait and see state. He might still pass away but we are hoping he survives. The vets are optimistic. We have a small amount in our savings but we are not able to afford the full amount. Any help from our friends and family or even fans of the comics, to help pay towards his emergency surgery would be desperately and greatly appreciated. I know we are not the only ones tight on money in this economy so please know, no matter what amount you can pay/or upvote this post, if you are able to help us we are forever thankful for anything you can do. http://spot.fund/vnr8hsc NEXT COMIC DUMP: https://imgur.com/gallery/nFMWmPE
item.dc:creator: ristay

item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have. Tuesday meme dump of chaotic videos
item.description:
1. Gimme your best advice in the comments!
2. A masterpiece
3. Maan, I know that we imgurians are just bunch of weirdos, and I would still consider people who are in astrology to be even bigger weirdos. Like no star 3000 lights years is controlling whether you are trustworthy... like wtf? How does this even make sense>!>!
4. Instructions clear: pumped up the Jam
5
6
7. People: so what do you do when you're alone Introverts:
8
9. New Drake diss just dropped
10. She must be getting a lot of tips ;)
12. This is straight out of a cartoon. (glad the little guy is okay)
13. Merlin got them moves
14. Beer tax
15 As a small game dev this is how may days go, pretty much. Anyway If you liked the humor of this dump I think you might like my wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game, called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)"! Please wishlist, it would really encourage me to finish it: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/ P. S. If you have mental health issues, hope this dump helped a bit to cheer you up! Stay strong : )
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: I almost died because of one of these idiots
item.description: The light was changing and he stepped on the gas and blew through it. Nobody in any direction could see anything, and me and my girlfriend almost got T-boned. It's not just the driving hazards though, the pollution is also killing us and the planet.
item.dc:creator: GermanSausagesAreTheWurst

item.title: These bottom shelf memes should never be used to supplement therapy.
item.description:
..but I hear laughter can be good for your #mental_health
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
I fucked up and cropped out the context. It originally said, "I thought I found the love of my life, but he used to smoke Marijuana"
Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join to lurk in the corners Join for the meme challenges Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Join for the NSFW memes
Join to chat with hilarious people
@CrimeBrulee feel free to ignore this notification as well.
Join the share the braincell
Join to watch Kill Tony with us every Monday Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST, you can catch us on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) vs the red light of death tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Comic dump- raising funds to help save my dog
item.description:
I have been a long time imgurian comic artist who shares her stories. I posted yesterday about my dog needing help and so many of you rallied around us and generated funds and upvotes for exposure. Atreyu is still in the animal hospital and his bills have gone up to $8,000 and it’s growing each day Atreyu needs to be hospitalized. Thanks to Imgur, my family and friends we have reached $5,000 so far. We are terrified the vet bills might go over $9,000 so any extra funds will be saved for any complications We are desperate to save him. If you have ever laughed, smiled or enjoyed my comics I beg of you to help upvote this for the fund awareness. I don’t want to lose my best friend. Please and thank you from the bottom of my heart. —————- Original post details: We need help. On May 11th, at 11:30 pm, our beloved German Shepherd, Atreyu, had his stomach flip; Gastric Dilatation Volvulus (GDV). This is an emergency and life-threatening situation in which a dog with this condition has on average two hours to live. That night, while feeding my foster kitten, I checked on Atreyu, who had seemed slightly off the hour before. His abdomen had swelled up to three or four times the size it should be. I knew instantly his stomach had flipped and he was nearing death. Freddie was able to speed to the Veterinary ER Hospital and get there in just enough time for them to perform the life-saving surgery. Atreyu isn’t out of the woods yet, he will be hospitalized for a few more days. His organs had a lot of pressure put on them: especially his liver and spleen, so he is in a critical wait and see state. He might still pass away but we are hoping he survives. The vets are optimistic. We have a small amount in our savings but we are not able to afford the full amount. Any help from our friends and family or even fans of the comics, to help pay towards his emergency surgery would be desperately and greatly appreciated. I know we are not the only ones tight on money in this economy so please know, no matter what amount you can pay/or upvote this post, if you are able to help us we are forever thankful for anything you can do. http://spot.fund/vnr8hsc
Today’s update, I had to drive to the animal hospital to help feed Atreyu as he wasn’t taking in food. They want to keep him there for at least two more days (assuming he doesn’t have any complications which might be too early to tell) and that sadly means more money. Imgur, thank you for being such a family to us and helping us with exposure and (if you can) funds. http://spot.fund/vnr8hsc For Imgur tax I am uploading more and more comics to help save my pup. They are my OC comics I have shared over the years here but I’m hoping to repost them for exposure and help. NEXT COMICS https://imgur.com/gallery/bAXwSOq
item.dc:creator: ristay

item.title: Wholesome post to brighten your day 1279
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/MoQc2UR Wholesome Post 1278 https://imgur.com/gallery/u7gkSNN Wholesome Post 1277 https://imgur.com/gallery/PUAlS14 Wholesome Post 1276 https://imgur.com/gallery/N6scbuS Wholesome Post 1275 https://imgur.com/gallery/sc2CZZq Wholesome Post 1274 https://imgur.com/gallery/cmu0zgg Wholesome Post 1273 https://imgur.com/gallery/hGuSUJo Wholesome Post 1272
I include a fundraiser link in all of my posts to help raise money for people in need. I hope we can help https://www.gofundme.com/f/finnegan-needs-a-lifesaving-surgery
I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48
I hope this post brightened your day :) and i hope it is a lovely day for you! If you need to talk I am always available on discord (username HaveAGreatDay) and happy to listen. You matter, and if you are struggling please reach out for help. I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48

item.dc:creator: agarbagecannot

item.title: neurodiverse mental health is difficult in a world made for neurotypical people
item.description:
Autistic inertia can be understood as a sensory delay. It's important to recognize that individuals with ASD usually are fully aware of their surroundings and what's happening. ASD cat DOESN'T ignore/register ADHD cat's actions. They are fully aware. They just didn't get the social cue to play/react towards them -thinking ADHD might just need attention/need to release energy. To not interrupt them, ASD cat waits. When ADHD stops, ASD happily hugs her to show "Yes. I love you too."
Not necessarly whats best for most people is best for you... EDIT: thanks for the many replies and most viral, didnt expect this post to become so big :D
item.dc:creator: vanderzee

2. Oooo that’s the acronym

4. Sent to my friend with a German
5. Peak art
6. Not my dog
7. Reese’s Puff is the top cereal
8. Sunscreen time o year
9. So perfect
10. More than that if I am being real
11. Love his face here
12. True
13. Poor ChatGPT
14. Getting CRAB HEAT inked this Friday
15. One of my favorite actors. Love watching his movies with friends
16. A good look for all three
17. Double kill!
Just starting this one. His books are really fun. The Last Good Kiss Goodbye is his most famous and it includes a dog named Fireball Roberts
